sentiment: What we build with patience outlasts what we rush to completion.

stories.title: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement
stories.summary: After years of fighting for the right to fix what they own, farmers finally win — patience wears down even the sturdiest walls.

stories.title: Spider venom kills varroa mites without harming honeybees
stories.summary: Nature's precision engineering — a targeted solution that protects what matters while removing what harms it.

stories.title: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
stories.summary: Rebuilding a foundation from scratch, one test at a time — the kind of patient work that compounds.
